title: helichrysum plinthocalyx
intro: Helichrysum plinthocalyx, also known as the island helichrysum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain, swelling, and infection. The health benefits of Helichrysum plinthocalyx include its ability to improve circulation, reduce stress and anxiety, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for a range of ailments. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum plinthocalyx can be taken in the form of essential oils, capsules, or teas, and are often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
